---
title: "[Curriculum Vitae](files/cv.pdf)"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
📥 **[Download CV as PDF](files/cv.pdf)**
:::

## 💼 Experience

### Machine Learning Engineer | Verisure Innovation AB
*June 2024 – Present*

- Building computer vision solutions for edge devices

## 🎓 Education

### Master's Degree
**High Performance Computing** — Chalmers University of Technology, Sweden

### Bachelor's Degree
**Electrical Engineering** — Beijing Normal University, China

## 🛠️ Skills

| Area | Technologies |
|---|---|
| **Specialization** | Digital Image Processing, Computer Vision, Object Detection, Object Segmentation, Edge Computing, Efficient ML |
| **Frameworks** | PyTorch, Keras, TensorFlow, TFLite/Micro, Apache TVM |
| **Languages** | Python, C++ |
